CL-04.title: Image Alt Text
CL-04.description: Images on the website lack appropriate alt text, making it inaccessible to visually impaired users.
CL-04.remediation: Add descriptive alt text to all images to improve accessibility for screen readers.

CL-05.title: Color Contrast
CL-05.description: Some text elements on the website have low color contrast ratios, hindering readability for users with visual impairments.
CL-05.remediation: Adjust the color combinations to ensure sufficient color contrast for better readability.

CL-13.title: Keyboard Navigation
CL-13.description: The website lacks proper keyboard navigation support, hampering accessibility for users who rely on keyboard input.
CL-13.remediation: Ensure all interactive elements are accessible and navigable via keyboard tabbing and shortcuts.

CL-16.title: Video Captions
CL-16.description: Videos on the website lack captions, making them inaccessible to users with hearing impairments.
CL-16.remediation: Add captions or transcripts to all videos to ensure accessibility for all users.

CL-18.title: Contact Form Accessibility
CL-18.description: The website contact forms lack proper labels and landmarks for accessible form completion.
CL-18.remediation: Add descriptive labels and ARIA landmarks to enhance contact form accessibility.

CL-05.title: Provide Alt Text for Images
CL-05.description: Ensure all images have descriptive alt text to assist users using screen readers.
CL-05.remediation: Add alt text to all images on the website.

CL-06.title: Ensure Keyboard Navigation
CL-06.description: Ensure that all website functionalities can be accessed and operated using a keyboard only.

CL-07.title: Implement ARIA Landmarks
CL-07.description: Use ARIA landmarks to provide additional context for screen reader users.

CL-03.title: Alt Text for Images
CL-03.description: Images should have descriptive alt text for screen readers
CL-03.remediation: Add alt text to all images to make them accessible to visually impaired users

CL-04.title: Color Contrast Ratio
CL-04.description: Ensure that text has sufficient color contrast to be easily readable
CL-04.remediation: Continue to monitor and maintain color contrast ratios across the website

CL-04.title: Alt Text for Images
CL-04.description: All images should have descriptive alt text for screen readers.
CL-04.remediation: Add alt text to images for improved accessibility.

CL-05.title: Keyboard Navigation
CL-05.description: Website must be navigable using keyboard only.

CL-06.title: Alternative Text for Images
CL-06.description: Provide alternative text for images to assist users with visual impairments.

CL-07.title: Keyboard Navigation
CL-07.description: Ensure all website functionalities can be accessed using a keyboard.

CL-08.title: Color Contrast
CL-08.description: Maintain sufficient color contrast for text readability.
